acceptance_criteria:
- [ ] Target DAG documented
- [ ] Forbidden edges listed
- [ ] Policy references real crate names
description:
**Problem**
Boundary assumptions are implicit and drifting across crates.

**Files:** Cargo workspace metadata, architecture docs
design: Define allowed edges and forbidden edges as explicit policy. Align crate manifests with policy and add a one-page reference for contributors.
title: Publish target DAG + forbidden dependency edges
Add git wire sparse _v and WireBeadFull JSON roundtrip tests

description:
**Problem**
Durability/idempotency model fixes are not covered by the normal test suite, so regressions (e.g. non-monotonic client-observed receipts) can slip in.

**Design**
- Add a regression test under beads_stateright_models/tests that executes the durability idempotency ActorModel to completion and asserts all properties.
- Expose the example's build_model() so the test can call it without duplicating logic.
- Keep the test deterministic (single thread) and fail fast if model checking does not complete.

**Acceptance**
- [ ] Test added in beads_stateright_models/tests that runs the durability idempotency model and asserts properties.
- [ ] Example exposes a callable build_model() for the test.
- [ ] cargo test in beads_stateright_models passes.

**Files:** beads_stateright_models/examples/durability_idempotency_machine.rs, beads_stateright_models/tests/
title: Stateright regression test for durability idempotency model

acceptance_criteria:
- [ ] Mid-file corruption retains all valid prefix frames in active history
- [ ] Repair outcomes are explicit enum states; whole-file quarantine only for truly unrecoverable cases
- [ ] Integration test covers large segment with single bad interior frame and verifies prefix survivability
description:
**Problem**
`fsck --repair` quarantines an entire segment on mid-file corruption, discarding all valid prefix records in that file.

**Files:** `crates/beads-daemon-core/src/wal/fsck.rs`, `crates/beads-rs/tests/integration/wal/fsck.rs`
design: Replace whole-file quarantine for mid-file corruption with prefix salvage: materialize a repaired segment containing only verified prefix frames, then atomically swap/index it. Model repair outcomes with explicit typed variants that distinguish tail-truncate, prefix-salvage, and unrecoverable.
title: Fsck mid-file repair should salvage valid prefix
